---
title: "All OECD Reports"
subtitle: "Browse every curated report by date, type, or India-relevance"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, oecd-type, india-relevance, oecd-url, categories]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Published"
    title: "Report"
    oecd-type: "Type"
    india-relevance: "India ★"
    oecd-url: "OECD source"
    categories: "Topics"
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  feed: true
---

Use the filter box to search across titles and topics. Click any column header to sort. The **OECD source** column links directly to each report on the OECD website.

**India-relevance** is a 1-5 editorial rating: how directly a report bears on Indian semiconductor policy debates.

- ★★★★★ (5) — Essential reading; speaks directly to active Indian policy questions
- ★★★★ (4) — Strong relevance; useful benchmarking or transferable lessons
- ★★★ (3) — Moderate; selectively useful for specific angles
- ★★ (2) — Low direct relevance but contains transferable data points
- ★ (1) — Curated for completeness of the OECD tracking mission

```{=html}
<script>
// Post-render enhancement: convert the plain-text OECD URL column into
// clickable link buttons, and render the india-relevance number as stars.
(function () {
  function enhance() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.listing-oecd-url').forEach(function (el) {
      var url = (el.textContent || '').trim();
      if (!url || el.dataset.enhanced === '1') return;
      el.dataset.enhanced = '1';
      el.innerHTML = '<a href="' + url + '" class="oecd-source-inline" target="_blank" rel="noopener">OECD ↗</a>';
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('.listing-india-relevance').forEach(function (el) {
      var n = parseInt((el.textContent || '').trim(), 10);
      if (!n || el.dataset.enhanced === '1') return;
      el.dataset.enhanced = '1';
      el.innerHTML = '<span class="india-relevance" title="India relevance: ' + n + '/5">' + '★'.repeat(n) + '</span>';
    });
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', enhance);
  } else {
    enhance();
  }
  // Re-run after sort/filter events (Quarto uses list.js which re-renders the DOM)
  setTimeout(enhance, 250);
  setTimeout(enhance, 1000);
})();
</script>
```
